meaning: adj.日耳曼人的,条顿人的,日尔曼语的n.日耳曼语
examples: The woman emitted a Teutonic sigh.
Teutonic, based on an old Latin quote, or
A pretty Irish governess and a glacial Teutonic blonde all add merrily to the mix.
It was constructed about the same time and with the same Teutonic attention to detail.
My guess is, rather, that there was more than a little Teutonic calculation involve.
